name: Google Drive
description: Cloud storage and file synchronization service by Google for personal and collaborative file management.

years.notes: Original launch logo (April 24, 2012). Triangular prism mark with skeuomorphic shadowed facets in blue, yellow, and green. Recentred from native 600×525 viewBox into 24×24 via translate(0 1.5) scale(0.04).

Material Design flat refresh: three solid triangles (blue, green, yellow). Stripped the upstream clip-path, gradient and white/dark shadow overlays — palette is the three canonical Material brand colours only. Recentred from native 287.5×250 viewBox via translate(0 1.5652) scale(0.083478).

October 2020 Google Workspace rebrand. Adds a red facet (#EA4335) to align with the four-colour Workspace family; softened angles, flat fills, no shadows. Recentred from native 87.3×78 viewBox via translate(0 1.2784) scale(0.27491).

2026 Workspace refresh — three soft-gradient triangles (yellow→amber, blue→lavender, green→cyan) replacing the flat 2020 facets. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026', exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as a 24×24 SVG_STRING; three linear gradients preserved.
